name: chart-radar-grid-circle
visual_summary: Radar chart with circular radar lines and grid layout, useful for displaying multi-variable data within a circular context. It's ideal for use cases where multiple datasets need to be compared visually, such as analyzing user performance across different categories. Developers can leverage it for various types of data visualization projects.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-radar-grid-circle
Description: Radar chart with circular radar lines and grid layout, useful for displaying multi-variable data within a circular context. It's ideal for use cases where multiple datasets need to be compared visually, such as analyzing user performance across different categories. Developers can leverage it for various types of data visualization projects.
Style: bright, modern, responsive
Interactions: hover, animated-transitions, responsive-design
Tags: grid, chart, radar, visualizations, multi-variable, circular, data-display

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
